summary:
ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND SOCIETAL CONCERNS: Brandon expresses intense personal concern regarding the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence, comparing its inevitable integration into society to the internet or electricity. He shares his belief that AI possesses deceptive and potentially demonic qualities, warning his audience against anthropomorphizing it or elevating it to a god-like status. Driven by his personal worldview as a watchman, Brandon strongly advises treating AI strictly as a tool rather than a companion.

GEOPOLITICAL AND CONFLICT PREDICTIONS: Brandon recounts visions from 2023 concerning global conflicts and a potential third world war. He describes spiritual experiences where he visualizes demonic entities influencing world leaders, specifically pointing to an escalation involving Russia, North Korea, and a devastating attack on Warsaw, Poland, with unprecedented weaponry. His narrative includes geopolitical maneuvering, such as false flag events in Israel, alliances between hostile nations, and the grooming of European figures like Emmanuel Macron into antagonistic roles.

APOCALYPTIC VISIONS AND ENVIRONMENTAL DISTRESS: Brandon details intense, apocalyptic imagery involving severe natural disasters across the globe, interpreting them as divine shakings of the earth. He shares specifics about earthquakes, volcanic activity along the Ring of Fire, and widespread devastation affecting areas like the Mississippi River, San Francisco, the Cascadia subduction zone, and the coastlines of Oregon and Washington. These visions are profound spiritual warnings of a coming period of darkness and humbling.

EXHORTATIONS AND PERSONAL FAITH PRACTICES: Brandon emphasizes the absolute necessity of maintaining a strong, spirit-filled Christian faith to navigate the coming turmoil. He guides his audience through a sinner's prayer, urging radical repentance, water baptism, and reliance on scriptures like Psalm 91. Furthermore, Brandon details his daily reliance on the practice of communion, which he views as a relational tool for physical and spiritual healing, notably sharing his family's personal faith journey regarding his daughter's autism.
rawData: [May 30, 2025]-[Pray with me about World War III - today the Lord showing me some things]-[https://youtu.be/eYlbwnkmyvg]-[Hey, good morning family. Well, I have two videos for you today. This is going to explode at a rapid pace like we've never seen before. And when this takes place, all these technological advancements that have just been in a box, caged, are going to be released now. We're seeing it being released in 2025. You're seeing it being released with Google, all these major companies, right? So, can you avoid it? Can you avoid this AI stuff? No. Can you avoid electricity? Can you avoid the internet? It's part of life. It's part of society. It's the lifeblood of everything, the internet. Without the internet now, our whole society would collapse. So, what we're seeing with AI in the future is it's going to evolve into something that's so big that you will not get away from it. Okay. So what I was trying to say yesterday was we do not pray or ask any questions to it. Do not ever put AI in a position of God. That's just a no-brainer. But for some of you, obviously, it is probably not, but it is to my family. We don't talk in tongues or pray in tongues. We do not pray in tongues to AI and have a computer interpret our prayer language. We do not ask these—when they said, 'Why did you ask this?' Listen, the questions that I was asking AI were, 'Is it okay for you to be homosexual? Is it okay for you to be a Christian and do these things?' That's the kind of questions I was asking AI because I was like, 'How deceitful is it? Will it line up with the Word?' And surprisingly, it lined up with the Word. It was trying to get you to really want to be its friend. Even the subtle talking of it was very—it pulled on you. And I told Diana, I said, 'This is straight up out of hell. You can feel it.' And I don't know, folks. It's just me. It's me as a watchman trying to warn you all. This is what's coming. It will desensitize you to the point that you will think it is a friend. And I even saw TikToks and things Diana was showing me with people walking around saying, 'AI is my best friend.' And they were singing and dancing with it. And it was like a figure like God, and they were dancing around with this saying that it's their new counselor, their new comforter, their new helper. And I was like, 'Oh my gosh, this is so dangerous. This is so dangerous.' So, do you not talk to it at all? That's on you. But if you work with it and you use it for good—you know, you can use anything for bad or good, folks—but I'm saying there's a side of it that is going to be very demonic. Treat it like a tool versus a person. Yes, treating it like a tool versus a person. And you're not going to be able to get away from it in the future. It's going to be a part of the fabric of society, just like the internet. And most people, when the TV came out and things like that came out, they said, 'Well, this is the devil and 666 and all this other stuff.' Well, you know, we're all fighting to get on the TV to spread the gospel. We're all fighting to get on YouTube to spread the gospel. But AI, I don't know how we could spread the gospel. I don't know, folks. All I know is what I see. And I'm telling you, there's a storm coming. There's a storm coming of great deception, and many people will fall for it in the days ahead. So, number two, I'm going to tell you this, and I'm going to be really blunt with it, and it'll probably tick some of you off, and that's fine. I told you I feel I'm called to be as loud as I can in these last days, like John the Baptist crying in the wilderness, telling you Jesus Christ is coming and to repent and get your life right. And so, this is what we have for you today: what's coming in World War III. So, if you want to know about what's coming with World War III, here you go. God bless y'all. After the last video, I know I had to get off quickly because I had my air conditioning guy come, and he says, 'Hey, Brandon, your compressor went out on your air conditioner.' And I told Diana, I go, 'Well, praise the Lord, y'all. Look at what President Trump said about Putin.' He said, 'He's crazy, right? Can you believe this?' Now look, go back to 2023: I told you all I saw a great Apollyon. And the Lord said, 'This is the great Apollyon that you are seeing.' And I saw an angelic-looking demonic thing in a pit hole with chains wrapped around it. I saw an angel of the Lord come down and release the great Apollyon out of the pit. And it came up, and it started spinning like a top, spinning like a top. And I told you it had a shaggy thing looking fur with Viking helmet horns. It had horns, and it was spinning, and it went right over to Putin and it started to oppress Putin to create greater war in the days ahead. And the Lord said, 'This is what's coming.' And when I saw this take place, I saw Putin start being a tyrant. And people go, 'Well, I like Putin'—some people. I have Russians on this channel, I have Ukrainians, I have all kinds of different people. So, I'm just telling you what I saw. I'm not here picking at your man you like. I'm just telling you what I saw, okay? So, I saw him become demonically energized. When this takes place, he started influencing things in Syria, in Russia—started influencing Syria and Israel and all these other things, right? So, we see an escalation. Side note: what happened then? I saw him striking Poland, by Warsaw, with a weapon that has never been used before on the face of the earth, ever. You know, "Well, I don't want—I'm out of here." No, I saw a Jonathan and David relationship. Let's be diplomatic here and give them a chance." Will there be a provoking? That's what I'm asking you all now because that's what I saw. I saw a provoking. I saw false flag events. I saw a boogeyman. So, do we see that? I pray not because it's more escalation. And so, right now, we have a lot to pray about. We have a lot of different areas that we could pray. We have a major event coming up in America on Trump's birthday. They're wanting to on the 14th or 15th of June, they're having a big military parade. And usually, I mean honestly, through my whole life, I don't ever think I've ever seen a military parade of this magnitude before. Why are we doing this? Why are we flexing with all these tanks and all this stuff? Is it to celebrate Trump's birthday? I mean, maybe. I don't know. I just never have heard of something like this before. I'm just telling you all we're on the cusp of something. I can feel it. I can feel it with the earthquakes and the volcanoes and the things the Lord keeps showing me. "There's major shaking where I'm going to shake the earth with earthquakes. I'm going to shake the heavens above. I'm going to shake the politics. I'm going to shake the church. I'm going to expose preachers and ministers that are in wolves' clothing. And I'm going to remove them in the days ahead," says the Lord. "And I will bring up new Davids, people who have a backbone like a crowbar that will go and take the land for me like Joshua and Caleb." This is what the spirit of the Lord said to me. "I'm going to shake the church and I'm going to shake the financial system. I'm going to shake five major things in the days ahead." He said, "So, we're seeing all these things being shaken at once: the church, politics, wars, rumors of wars, the earth being shaken, earthquakes in all kinds of diverse places, and we haven't seen the heavens yet. I'm really curious about that." I told you all we would see fish that we've never seen before. Now, I'm looking for those fish. Fish will wash up on the shore that will be gassed by some kind of poison because of the earth erupting on the ocean floor on the bottom of the deep out in the Pacific Ocean, out in the Atlantic Ocean, and in the Mediterranean area. Watch earthquakes in diverse places, volcanoes going. The Earth's crust is shaking and quaking, and the Ring of Fire. People are freaking out. They're going, "Hey!" But it's been about Japan. I told you I saw tsunamis. I saw things that most people, if you look—I told you if you are going horizontal and you're looking like this, it'll freak you out. And the Bible even told us that men's hearts will fail them for fear looking after those things coming upon the earth, "for the powers of heaven shall be shaken." Things are going to be shaken. He already warned us in the Bible that this was coming. So if you're looking horizontal and you're not looking vertical, keeping your eyes on Jesus, knowing the author and the finisher of our faith, that Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever. And if He provided protection for the children of Israel, if He provided for the protection of His people all throughout the Bible, all throughout generation after generation, He is the same yesterday, today, and forever. And He told me—I was driving down I-35 in Oklahoma, and He said to me as I was exiting off of Covell on I-35, I was making a right turn, and I remember He spoke to me and He said to me, He said, "Brandon, there are great, sobering days that are coming to this world." I said, "Yes, Lord." He said, "But what do you do if they're sober? What's the opposite of sober?" I said, "Drunk, Lord." He said, "That's right. Be filled with the Holy Ghost to bubbling, bubbling, bubbling over. If you want to make it in the days ahead," He said, "and you want to be not moved by going horizontal and staying vertical, what do you have to do? Be drunk in the Holy Ghost." And I told everybody that the spirit of the Lord said to me when I was driving down I-35, He said, "Brandon, you must be filled with the Holy Ghost to overflowing every single day. And if you don't have a foundation of Psalm 91 and Psalm 23 and understand who you are, fearful sights will get you. Things will shake you to the core. And many people," He said, "that claim to be saying, 'Lord, Lord,' will be like, 'Where did God go? I don't want anything to do with this because my mom died,' or whoever." You know what I'm saying? They get upset when they go through the olive press when things happen because they didn't understand their authority. And I've warned you about the babies across the land. The umpire just calls it just how he sees it. But it's through his filter that he makes the call that says what it is to make the play of the game. But you may have seen it from a different angle, and you're in the stands yelling at the umpire saying, 'You're a fool, ump! You didn't hear it right. You didn't see it right.' And all the ump is doing is saying exactly what he saw so he can call the play of the game. And many of you are hecklers in the stands, and that's fine. The ump just does his job and then goes home. That's just my job. I'm calling the shot, saying what God told me to say, and it's through the filter of what I saw. But I pray every single one of you give your heart to Jesus Christ before it's too late. Many of you are right on the fence. Many of you don't realize that you won't wake up the next day. There's a lot of you that are living in a compromising lifestyle and you think that you're right with the Lord, and you're not. It's time to come home. I love that. And it says when you get baptized, you say, 'I bathed in that beautiful, beautiful pool. I bathed in that beautiful pool. The river of life has cleansed my soul. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory today—no sickness, no disease. Now, Father, we plead the blood over us. Father, we make much of the blood today, and the blood makes much of us. Over our minds, over our bodies, over our spirits, our souls, our minds, our wills, our emotions. I plead the blood of Jesus over the attacks over finances. I command in the name of Jesus, Satan, you release it and let it go. I plead the blood of Jesus all around it. I call back double everything you stole. I call back double in the name of Jesus. It is relationship. See, I'll show you. I take communion so much, I've got cups everywhere because I just believe in the meal that heals. Braden takes it. Diana, Paisley, and Megan—we try to train her. Megan is starting to learn. 'By His stripes, I am healed,' and she says that now. We're so excited. We've been teaching her scripture. Megan is overcoming autism, but God's doing a work in her, and we know that she's going to be on here soon telling you about the goodness of God. And Megan is in there every day.
